"'''Pearls in the Sand'''" is a short story written by [[Voronica Whitney-Robinson]] for [[Star Wars Insider 74|''Star Wars Insider'' 74]]. It takes place shortly before the events of ''[[Star Wars Galaxies: The Ruins of Dantooine]]'',<ref name="TERC">''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]''</ref> presumably in [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]].

==Plot summary==
[[Dusque Mistflier|Dusque]] and [[Tendau Nandon|Tendau]] follow rumors of a fabled [[Krayt Dragon Graveyard|krayt dragon graveyard]] into the wilderness of [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] and are nearly done in by [[Zabrak/Legends|Zabrak]] [[Thief/Legends|robbers]]. Left to [[Death/Legends|die]] in the [[Desert/Legends|desert]], the two [[Scientist/Legends|scientists]] persevere and discover the [[Krayt dragon/Legends|krayt]] spawning ground – a place where the beasts die after laying their eggs. Dusque takes a krayt dragon egg for future study.
